title: acalypha longistipularis
intro: Acalypha longistipularis is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the Long-stipule Copperleaf. It is a shrub or small tree found in tropical Africa and has been used for its medicinal properties. Acalypha longistipularis has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help in reducing fever, pain, and swelling. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat conditions such as skin infections, respiratory problems, and digestive issues.
